hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*sed([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*sed[[:space:]]+-n([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"sed -n is read-only"}}'; else printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"only sed -n is auto-allowed"}}'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*(g|m)?awk([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; stripped=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | sed -e "s/'[^']*'//g" -e 's/"[^"]*"//g'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'inplace' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '(^|[[:space:]])(--load|-l)' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'system[[:space:]]*\(' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '>>' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '>[[:space:]]*"' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '\|[[:space:]]*"' || printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq '\|&' || printf '%s' "$stripped" | grep -Eq '>'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"awk writes/executes; only read-only awk is auto-allowed"}}'; else printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"awk appears read-only"}}'; fi
